title: Hash Functions: The Cryptographic Fingerprints
description: Master cryptographic hash functions - the fundamental building blocks for integrity verification, digital signatures, and password storage. Understand SHA-2, SHA-3, and their quantum security.
learningObjectives: Define cryptographic hash functions and their essential properties
Explain the differences between SHA-2 and SHA-3 families
Implement hashing for common use cases: integrity, passwords, MACs
Understand collision resistance and birthday attacks
Analyze the quantum impact on hash functions (Grover's algorithm)
Apply hash functions correctly in cryptographic protocols
